form.formComment: Last start was well back in the run when 8th (Fr6) over 1790m at this track, at the bell was 9th-15.6 beaten 14 m by Rocking Wroxton (2:14.80) in NR up to 39 on April 7 at $81. Before that, 7th (Sr2) over 2190m at this track, beaten 23 m by Maggacis (2:44.80) in NR up to 45 on March 27 at $51. Draws for a good showing.

form.formComment: Last start by 3 m when quickly away, (Fr1) at this track (2:14.80) beating The Tooth Fairy in NR up to 39 on April 7 at $3.50 at the bell was leading 1.4. Will benefit from the nice draw. Draws well so has strong claims again.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Withstood an early challenge for the lead from The Tooth Fairy.
Gave ground to be beaten 48m into 8th placing.
Raced roughly during the early stages of the score up.
Raced keenly during the middle stages.

form.formComment: Didn't do much last start, was driven from back in the field when 6th (Fr2) over 2190m at this track beaten 45 m by Nevs Dream (2:44.80) in NR up to 46 on March 27 at $61. Before that was driven from back in the field when 7th (Fr6) over 2190m at this track, beaten 40 m by Apology Accepted (2:43.10) in NR up to 45 on March 20 at $31. Hard to have.

form.formComment: Last start 5th (Fr5) over 2190m after showing early speed and racing wide at this track, beaten 30 m by Nevs Dream (2:44.80) in NR up to 46 on March 27 at $8. previousStarts.stewardsComment: Broke under pressure over the concluding stages.

form.formComment: Capable of better than we have seen lately. Backing up quickly after 7th (Fr2) over 1790m after showing early pace at this track beaten 40 m by The Art Of Success (2:11.10) in NR 49 to 53 on April 7 at $41. At the previous start was well back in the run when 9th (Fr5) over 1750m at Swan Hill was 9th-15 at the bell, beaten 19 m by Happenstbabeachboy (2:06.10) in NR 45 to 50 on March 31 at $11. Can improve sharply.

form.formComment: Recent efforts haven't been up to his best. Backing up quickly after 8th (Fr4) over 1790m after showing early pace at this track, beaten 60 m by The Art Of Success (2:11.10) in NR 49 to 53 on April 7 at $26.
